prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约25597名→28431名→30435名→33357名→38653名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约13056名，年均后移约3264名；2025年基准位次约38653名；该校在云南省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年62人、2022年66人、2023年68人、2024年76人、2025年83人，逐年扩招；2026年计划85人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.4%，扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第157名，近年排名从198名（2021）逐步上升至157名（2026），学校综合实力稳步提升；该校在声誉舆情文件中未见明显正面或负面事件；抖音热度排名第79位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，报考关注度相对平稳；延边大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在朝鲜语、外国语言文学等特色领域，对理科考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，延边大学理科组开设相关专业，对考生有一定吸引力；云南省2026年高考总报名约37.79万人，按近年物理类占比约60.66%估算，物理类考生约22.92万人，较2025年17.33万人增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；延边大学位于吉林省延边州，距云南较远，跨省就读的地域偏好可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；该校在云南招生占比约1%-2%，属非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划仅小幅扩招2.4%而考生规模大幅增长约32%、学校层次稳步提升但无A级学科支撑、抖音热度一般等关键因素，预计2026年理科（物理类）竞争进一步加剧，位次在2025年38653名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约39512名，区间39012–40012名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 25,597 → 28,431 → 30,435 → 33,357 → 38,653, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13,056 over the past 4 years, averaging about 3,264 per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 38,653; the enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science (physics category) was 62 in 2021, 66 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 83 in 2025, with annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 85, a slight expansion of about 2.4% compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is about 157th in 2026, with a gradual rise from 198th (2021) to 157th (2026), showing steady improvement in overall strength; no significant positive or negative events were found in the reputation and public opinion documents; its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, and relatively stable application attention; Yanbian University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with advantageous disciplines mainly in Korean language, foreign language and literature, and other characteristic fields, which have limited appeal to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering have consistently high social popularity; Yanbian University offers related majors in the science group, which have some appeal to candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province college entrance examination is about 377,900, and based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 60.66%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 229,200, an increase of about 32% compared to 173,300 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Yunnan, and the regional preference for cross-province study may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 1%-2%, making it a non-primary source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan only slightly expands by 2.4% while the candidate scale significantly increases by about 32%, the university level steadily improves but lacks A-level discipline support, and the Douyin popularity is average, it is expected that competition in the 2026 science (physics category) will further intensify, with rankings continuing to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 38,653; the predicted minimum ranking is about 39,512, with a range of 39,012–40,012.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Artificial Intelligence.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 39,012–40,012, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings better than 39,012 can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Clinical Medicine; candidates with rankings close to 40,012 are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
